pi_items.source: Task instructions specify saving as Seasonal_Patterns and web search confirms .dva is the correct Oracle Analytics Desktop workbook extension.
Task instructions explicitly require renaming the canvas to Staffing Analysis.
Data inspection of sample_order_lines2023.xlsx confirms Sales and Order Date exist. Task instructions require extracting Month and Day of Week from Order Date.
Task instructions require a Heatmap (Grid) visualization, and web search confirms Oracle Analytics Desktop supports a Grid Heat Map.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating a Grid Heat Map using the sample_order_lines2023.xlsx dataset, which contains Sales and Order Date columns. The Month and Day of Week columns must be derived from Order Date. The workbook must be saved as Seasonal_Patterns.dva (the standard Oracle Analytics extension) and the canvas renamed to Staffing Analysis.
